summary: Alice on F1 creates a real bearer cap (via pyana_create_bearer_cap MCP) targeting Bob on F2; OOB URI delivery (cp of pyana+bearer shim); F2 performs bilateral transfer (pyana_bilateral_action) producing real WitnessedReceipts with STARK proofs; CrossFedReceiptBundle v1 assembled from recipient_chain + attested roots (from /federation/roots) + HandoffCertificate built from delegation_chain; pyana-verifier verify-cross-fed-bundle accepts the bundle (exit 0 + overall_verified=true) and rejects a tampered version (introducer flipped). All core assertions drive real pyana-node MCP and the verifier binary.
scaffold_only_explanation: Old bash-theater assertions (alice_uri_produced_on_F1, uri_delivered_to_F2_inbox, handoff_replay_artifact_constructed, handoff_tampered_artifact_distinguishable) removed. They only tested heredoc writes, cp, and jq diff on synthetic JSON. All assertions now exercise the real MCP tools on pyana-node and the verify-cross-fed-bundle path in pyana-verifier.
blocked_on: SILVER-VISION §5.2.3: validate_handoff registry-lookup hardening + SwissTable wiring (scenario bypasses via direct bilateral_action)
Full CapTP delivery lane (pyana_captp_deliver + PresentHandoff + HandoffPresentation); scenario manually assembles the bundle and uses unchecked bilateral for receipt production

AttestedRoot export with real quorum signatures (current /federation/roots only returns height+merkle_root+count; bundle synthesizes roots with empty sigs — is_valid may pass in devnet single-node posture)
Real compact pyana-handoff: URI (still using pyana+bearer:<json> shim per two-ai-handoff blocker-2)
Receipt federation_id + executor_signature binding for cross-fed receipts (devnet bilateral turns are local and use Authorization::Unchecked)

bundle serde (#108 fixed 2026-05-25): hex_to_ints() now converts all [u8;32]/[u8;64] hex fields (merkle_root, federation_id, nonce, swiss, recipient_pk, introducer_signature, target_cell) to integer arrays before writing the bundle JSON, matching AttestedRoot + HandoffCertificate serde expectations
documented_gaps: When devnet is not running (http://127.0.0.1:7811/status and :7821/status fail), the MCP and verifier assertions are recorded false. The result.json is still produced and the expected comparison is deterministic.

The cross_fed_cert inside the bundle is constructed in the scenario script from the delegation_chain + federation IDs + fresh nonce/swiss. A production cross-fed handoff would emit a node-produced HandoffCertificate carrying the real CapTpDelivered authorization.
The two committees are extracted from the genesis.json files at scenario time (validators stripped of xmss_root). This matches what register-federation writes.
improve_dont_degrade: All previous infrastructure assertions (both_federations_responding, F*_exposes_federation_roots) are retained in must_pass. The eight new real assertions (MCP cells + cap + bilateral + bundle + two verifier outcomes) are in must_pass. No assertion was weakened or moved to scaffold_only/must_not_pass. When the blocked lanes land, add 'captp_deliver_used_on_F2', 'real_signed_attested_roots_in_bundle', 'handoff_cert_produced_by_node' etc. to must_pass and tighten the tampered case to a specific error code or sub-flag in the verdict.
